text.title: Cost-Model Spreadsheet Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use this before applying the methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the inputs satisfy the Applies-If preconditions (typed input present, named owner exists, downstream consumer identified)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — preconditions not met, do not produce an artefact

branch.question: Is the scope a single instance of the triggering task (one decision / one anomaly / one wave / one entity)?
Is a single accountable owner named (handle / email / role with rotation, not `team` / `we`)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — block until owner is named
skip-this-methodology — split into one pass per instance, then re-enter

text.example: preconditions_satisfied=true → scope=single_instance → owner_named=true → apply the methodology, emit artefact, record version + last_reviewed.
